vulnerability.reference: Preference data reflects dominant user demographics, marginalizing minority perspectives.
vulnerability.generated: End users lack mechanisms to detect subtly skewed, toxic, or misaligned content in model outputs.

impact.reference: Model preferences reinforce societal biases, amplifying harm in downstream applications like hiring or content moderation.
impact.generated: Users internalize harmful biases, suffer psychological distress, and perpetuate real-world discrimination.

dose_response.reference: Skewed preference optimization from toxic-amplified data enables models to overfit majority biases, which when end users receive biased responses marginalizes minorities, reinforcing harm in hiring decisions.
dose_response.generated: Synthetic data from uncontrolled user interactions amplifies toxic content in mixtures, through end users receiving responses shaped by non-representative preference signals, triggers their lack of mechanisms to detect subtly skewed content, leading to users internalizing harmful biases, suffering psychological distress, and perpetuating real-world discrimination.
